title: A Small Fraction
description: Party speaks with The Remainder. Final-world character beat. Quiet, small, lands.

steps.text: The Remainder sat on something that was not quite a bench. It had the shape of a bench. It was not, on closer inspection, a bench.

lines.speaker: The Remainder
lines.text: Of whoever was standing here before they got rounded down.

lines.speaker: The Remainder
lines.text: The rest went to Optimization. I'm what's left.

lines.speaker: The Remainder
lines.text: No. It is how this rounds.

lines.speaker: The Remainder
lines.text: Take your time. I'm not going anywhere. That's why they kept me.

lines.speaker: The Remainder
lines.text: Only when I try to be the whole number. Which I don't, anymore.

lines.speaker: The Remainder
lines.text: Sometimes I am the rounding error in someone else's arithmetic. That's the closest thing to company I have.

lines.speaker: Edge
lines.text: If we fix this. If we put things back.

lines.speaker: The Remainder
lines.text: Then I become a whole number again. I don't remember being a whole number.

steps.text: The party moved on. The Remainder stayed on what was not quite a bench. 0.00014 of something that used to be a person, waiting patiently to be math again.
